originalTitle: PufferLib RL dev with Joseph Suarez | Presentation at 11 EST
title: Refactoring network architecture and policy handling in PufferLib
summary: Worked on cleaning up the network architecture code in PufferLib to reduce complexity around static buffers, mixed precision, and weight registrations. The refactoring produced a cleaner design for encoders and policies, though further work on launch functions, kernels, and the optimizer remains.
